name: California Roll
description: Classic roll with imitation crab, avocado, and cucumber, topped with sesame seeds.

name: Spicy Tuna Roll
description: Fresh tuna mixed with spicy mayo, cucumber, and scallions, rolled in seaweed and rice.

name: Dragon Roll
description: Shrimp tempura and cucumber topped with avocado, eel sauce, and sesame seeds.

name: Salmon Nigiri (2 pieces)
description: Two pieces of premium salmon over pressed sushi rice.

name: Rainbow Roll
description: California roll topped with assorted fresh fish including tuna, salmon, and yellowtail.

name: Poke Bowl
description: Fresh ahi tuna or salmon over rice with edamame, seaweed salad, and your choice of toppings.

name: Sushi Platter (30 pieces)
description: Perfect for sharing! Assorted nigiri, maki rolls, and California rolls.

name: Party Platter (50 pieces)
description: Our ultimate sharing platter with a variety of sushi, sashimi, and specialty rolls.

name: Family Combo
description: 40 pieces of assorted rolls plus 2 miso soups and edamame. Feeds 3-4 people.

name: Sake (Hot/Cold)
description: Premium Japanese rice wine, served hot or cold.

name: Japanese Soda
description: Ramune and other refreshing Japanese sodas in various flavors.

name: Green Tea
description: Hot or iced traditional Japanese green tea.

name: Craft Beer Selection
description: Rotating selection of Japanese and local craft beers.
